description_long: This modern bungalow features a single-story open layout with a mix of indoor and outdoor living spaces. The structure includes a spacious living area, a dining section, and a kitchen, all visible through large windows and glass walls. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and light wood paneling, complemented by green landscaping and a paved entryway. A glass-enclosed sunroom or conservatory extends from one side, providing additional light and a connection to the outdoors. The roof is predominantly flat, with some sections featuring skylights or open frames. The arrangement of windows is asymmetrical, with grouped windows on the sides and a more regular pattern on the front facade.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with open-plan living, large glass windows, and a mix of white and wood finishes, featuring a glass sunroom and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and landscaped entry with greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glass sunroom/conservatory and the paved area adjacent to the building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open patio area, additional greenery, and the back facade's window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite front view focusing on the main living area, bookshelves, and the approach from the paved path.
